questions.question: What is the best-selling video game of all time?
questions.explanation: Minecraft has sold over 300 million copies worldwide.

questions.question: Which company created Mario?
questions.explanation: Mario was created by Shigeru Miyamoto at Nintendo.

questions.question: In which year was the original PlayStation released in Japan?
questions.explanation: The PlayStation was released in Japan on December 3, 1994.

questions.question: What game popularized the battle royale genre?
questions.explanation: PUBG (PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds) popularized the battle royale genre in 2017.

questions.question: What is the name of the protagonist in 'The Legend of Zelda'?
questions.explanation: The player controls Link, not Zelda (who is the princess).

questions.question: Which game features the phrase 'The cake is a lie'?
questions.explanation: "The cake is a lie" became a famous meme from Valve's Portal.

questions.question: What was the first commercially successful video game?
questions.explanation: Pong by Atari (1972) was the first commercially successful video game.

questions.question: Which game franchise has the character Master Chief?
questions.explanation: Master Chief is the protagonist of the Halo franchise.

questions.question: What does 'GTA' stand for?
questions.explanation: GTA stands for Grand Theft Auto, created by Rockstar Games.

questions.question: Which game won Game of the Year at The Game Awards 2023?
options: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
questions.explanation: Baldur's Gate 3 by Larian Studios won GOTY at The Game Awards 2023.

questions.question: In Fortnite, what is the main game mode about?
questions.explanation: Fortnite Battle Royale is about being the last player (or team) standing.

questions.question: What is the currency in the 'Animal Crossing' series?
questions.explanation: Bells are the currency used in the Animal Crossing series.

questions.question: Which game takes place in the underwater city of Rapture?
questions.explanation: BioShock (2007) is set in the dystopian underwater city of Rapture.

questions.question: How many players are on a standard League of Legends team?
questions.explanation: League of Legends has 5 players per team in standard play.

questions.question: Which company developed Elden Ring?
questions.explanation: Elden Ring was developed by FromSoftware in collaboration with George R.R. Martin.
